headline: Northrop Grumman Announces Date for Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Webcast
summary: FALLS CHURCH, Va., June 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) announced today that its second quarter 2026 financial results will be released on Tuesday, July 21, 2026, prior to the market opening. The earnings announcement, and accompanying earnings presentation, will be available on the company’s website at http://investor.northropgrumman.com. Earnings Call WebcastThe company will host a live, audio only, earnings call webcast at 9:30 a.m. ET the same day. This
